test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies the health endpoint returns a successful response.

test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful creation of an author with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name_422
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author without a required name field returns a validation error.

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful retrieval of an author by ID.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found_404
test_cases.description: Verifies that requesting a non-existent author ID returns 404.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful deletion of an author with no associated books.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_conflict_409
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author who has associated books returns a conflict error.

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful creation of a book with valid data and existing author/category.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn_409
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns a conflict error.

test_cases.name: get_book_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful retrieval of a book by ID.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_gone_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful soft deletion of a book.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful restoration of a soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: restore_not_deleted_book_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a book that is not deleted returns a bad request error.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful discount calculation for a book published more than a year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a book published less than a year ago returns a bad request error.

test_cases.name: increase_stock_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful increase of book stock via delta query parameter.

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that decreasing stock below zero returns an insufficient stock error.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful upload of a valid JPEG/PNG cover image under 2 MB.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_file_too_large_413
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading a cover image larger than 2 MB returns a content too large error.

test_cases.name: create_review_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful creation of a review for a book.

test_cases.name: create_tag_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful creation of a tag with a unique name.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful addition of multiple tags to a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful creation of an order with sufficient stock, deducts stock.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an order for a book with insufficient stock returns a bad request error.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_to_cancelled_returns_stock
test_cases.description: Verifies successful status update to cancelled and that stock is returned.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_transition_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that an invalid state transition (e.g., pending to delivered) returns a bad request error.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_confirmed_order_success
test_cases.description: Verifies successful retrieval of an invoice for an order in a confirmed/shipped/delivered state.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_pending_order_forbidden_403
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving an invoice for a pending order returns a forbidden error.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_partial_success_207
test_cases.description: Verifies partial success when some books in the bulk create request fail validation.
